member.name: M:Api_EFExample.Controllers.AuthController.Register(Core.DTO.RegisterRequest)
member.summary: Registers a new user with the provided registration details.
member.remarks: The request body must contain valid registration data as defined by . If the input data fails validation, a 400 Bad Request response is returned with validation details.
member.param: An object containing the user's registration information. Must not be null and must satisfy all validation requirements.
member.returns: ﻿An indicating the result of the registration operation. Returns with the registration result if successful; otherwise, returns if the registration fails or the input is invalid.
